---
title: "Analysing Ecological Data with Detection Error"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
author: "Péter Sólymos"
toc: true
format:
  html: 
    html-math-method: katex
    self-contained: true
---

Sessions:

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
fl <- list.files(".")
fl <- fl[grep("\\.html$", fl)]
fl <- fl[!grepl("index\\.html", fl)]

for (i in seq_along(fl)) {
    f <- fl[i]
    l <- suppressWarnings(readLines(f))
    l1 <- trimws(l[grep("<h1 class=\"title\">", l)])
    l1 <- gsub("<h1 class=\"title\">", "", l1)
    l1 <- gsub("</h1>", "", l1)
    cat("- Session ", i, ": [", l1, "](./", f, ")\n", sep = "")
}
```

See [GitHub repository](https://github.com/psolymos/analysing-ecological-data-with-detection-error) for the source code and data used in this workshop.

© 2025 Péter Sólymos -- This work is licensed under <a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/">CC BY-SA 4.0</a> <img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/cc.svg" alt="" style="max-width: 1em;max-height:1em;margin-left: .2em;"><img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/by.svg" alt="" style="max-width: 1em;max-height:1em;margin-left: .2em;"><img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/sa.svg" alt="" style="max-width: 1em;max-height:1em;margin-left: .2em;">
